body.title: Slate daily files — YYYYMMDD.slate.txt
body.result: Migrated slates from slate.md sections to dated files at ~/.TheIgors/claudecode/YYYYMMDD.slate.txt (D304). slate_manager.py renders dated files with Active/Done/Tools/Design-thread sections, cross-referenced with cc_queue done status. channel.py now shows local time. pe_chain.py stores full ISO timestamps. Fixed test loop writing to real channel. context-load and slateclose skills updated for new format.
body.description: D304: Migrate slates from ~/.TheIgors/cc_channel/slate.md (with Slate 0/1/2 sections) to dated files at ~/.TheIgors/claudecode/YYYYMMDD.slate.txt. Update slate_manager.py to write dated files. Update /context-load, /slateclose, /slate skills to use dated files. Archive current slate.md as 20260402.slate.txt. Update all blob notes that reference slate numbers. Epics remain as ticket tags.
